personal.name: Suchandra Mondal
personal.title: Flutter Developer | Mobile App Developer (iOS & Android)
personal.summary: Mobile application developer with 6+ years of experience and 5+ years in Flutter, specializing in building enterprise-grade, scalable cross-platform applications. Experienced in innovation-driven POCs, reusable accelerators, and internal component libraries to speed up project delivery. Strong background in Firebase, Azure integration, Clean Architecture, CI/CD, and Agile consulting environments. Proven ability to collaborate with stakeholders, translate business requirements into technical solutions, and deliver high-quality apps across domains including FinTech, Automotive, and Digital Transformation.

items: Firebase (Auth, Firestore, Realtime DB, Cloud Functions)

bullets: Delivered 3+ enterprise Flutter apps, improving maintainability by 35% using Clean Architecture.
Enabled 20–30% faster delivery by translating business requirements into scalable mobile solutions.
Led 10+ innovation POCs, including a flagship project showcased at Google Cloud Next 2025 and VivaTech.
Built reusable accelerators and UI libraries, reducing development effort by 30–40%.
Integrated Firebase and Azure APIs for secure, cloud-ready mobile solutions.
Improved performance by 25% via WebSockets, offline-first design, and CI/CD, ensuring on-time releases.
Developed and maintained Flutter applications across domains including fitness, e-commerce, dating, and food delivery.
Integrated third-party SDKs for analytics, payments, and real-time communication.
Improved application performance, reduced crashes, and enhanced UI/UX consistency.
Collaborated with designers, backend teams, and clients to deliver business-aligned solutions.

experience.company: Pitangent Analytics and Technology Solutions Pvt. Ltd
bullets: Contributed to the design and development of new feature specifications for Android applications.
Ensured seamless integration of applications with Android APIs to enhance performance and functionality.
Delivered high-quality content that consistently met or exceeded business and client requirements.
Developed clean, efficient, and maintainable code, ensuring high-quality software delivery.
Collaborated on project concepts and maintained optimal workflows for seamless development.
Assisted senior developers in managing and executing large-scale, complex design projects for corporate clients.
Conducted thorough quality assurance tests to identify and resolve errors, enhancing overall usability.

projects.title: Enterprise Fleet Management App
projects.description: A cross-platform Flutter application for real-time fleet tracking and management, supporting iOS, Android, and Web. Features live GPS tracking, driver management, route optimization, and analytics dashboards.

projects.title: Multi-Vendor E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-featured Flutter e-commerce app with multi-vendor support, real-time inventory management, Razorpay payment integration, and push notifications via Firebase Cloud Messaging.

projects.title: Personal Health & Fitness Tracker
projects.description: A Flutter wellness app integrating with device health APIs (HealthKit on iOS, Google Fit on Android) to track workouts, nutrition, sleep, and vitals. Features custom chart visualizations and daily goal tracking.

projects.title: Digital Banking Mobile App
projects.description: A secure digital banking application built with Flutter, featuring biometric authentication, real-time transaction history, fund transfers, and bill payments. Implemented with Clean Architecture and BLoC for maintainability.
